message:
Version 2.1.0 - Release Notes
YouTube Downloader Plus
Developed by Sujan Rai | Made in Nepal
================================================

NEW FEATURES
------------------------------------------------

1. Thumbnail Toggle
   - A new setting to enable or disable thumbnails in search results.
   - You can find this option in Settings.

2. Voice Search
   - Search using your voice directly from the search dialog.
   - Setup: Go to Settings, select a language, and restart the app when prompted.

3. Voice Recorder - Quality Settings
   Three new options have been added to the Voice Recorder tool:

   a) Bitrate Selection
      - Choose a bitrate that suits your needs.
      - Higher bitrate means better audio quality but a larger file size.

   b) Output Format Selection
      - Select your preferred audio format.
      - Supported formats include MP3, WAV, M4A, OPUS, FLAC, AAC, and more.

   c) Output Path Selection
      - Choose the folder where your recordings will be saved.

4. Translation Support
   - Translate transcripts, descriptions, and other major sections within the app.

5. Bug Fixes
   - Fixed freezing issues during playback.
   - Fixed lag and errors during downloads.
   - Fixed various bugs in search results.

================================================

EXTRA TOOLS
------------------------------------------------

1. AI Image Editor (Major Update)
   - Upload any image and transform it using AI.
   - Powered by NanoBanana Pro.
   - Write a simple prompt describing the changes you want.
   - Click "Edit Image" and wait for the preview.
   - Export the result with one click.
   - No login or signup required.
   - Note: This feature is currently in beta.

2. Image to PDF Converter
   - Convert one or multiple images into a single PDF file.

3. Dailymotion Downloader
   - Download videos or audio from Dailymotion.
   - Supports up to Full HD quality.
   - Simply paste a Dailymotion link to get started.

================================================

Future updates will include new features based on your requests, suggestions, and feedback.

Thank you for using YouTube Downloader Plus.
